content: Core domain models live in src/horse_fish/models.py using Pydantic v2 BaseModel. Enums use StrEnum. Factory methods (Run.create, Subtask.create) generate uuid4 IDs. datetime fields use datetime.now(UTC). All state enums: AgentState (idle/busy/dead), SubtaskState (pending/running/done/failed/escalated), RunState (planning/executing/reviewing/merging/completed/failed).

name: tdd-model-enhancements
description: TDD pattern for model enhancements: write tests first importing new enum, verify import error, implement enum after RunState, add fields to model with proper defaults (None for optional, Field(default_factory=list) for lists), verify serialization roundtrip
